concerns.text: Phase 6 (Tasks T026-T030) implements 'membrane network density', 'fractal dimension', and 'scaling law' analyses. These concepts are absent from spec.md (FRs/SCs) and plan.md. There is no task mapping for these features because the spec/plan do not define them, creating unapproved scope creep.

Task T013 specifies conformer ensemble size '≥ 20'. This fails to cover spec.md FR-003 which mandates 'size ≥ 50'. The task does not satisfy the functional requirement for the core computational methodology.

Task T014 focuses on 'torsional variance (bond, angle, dihedral)' but the implementation description in T013/T014 and the plan emphasize 'dihedral variance'. Spec.md FR-004 explicitly requires computing descriptors for 'bond, angle, dihedral'. The task description is ambiguous regarding the implementation of bond and angle variance, risking non-compliance with FR-004.

Tasks T026, T027, T028, T029, T030 are tagged with [US2] or [US3] but reference requirements (scaling laws, fractal dimensions) that do not exist in spec.md or plan.md. These are stale tags referencing non-existent FRs/SCs.
